prompt: I'm upgrading the People in Space KMP project (github.com/joreilly/PeopleInSpace) to AGP 9.0. Currently on AGP 8.12.3. The common module uses kotlin.multiplatform + com.android.library. The app module uses kotlin("android"). Please analyze and migrate it.
source: joreilly/PeopleInSpace — common has KMP+library (Path A), app has kotlin.android, uses SKIE + SQLDelight + KSP
agent_rubric: The common module's com.android.library plugin is replaced with com.android.kotlin.multiplatform.library
The common module's android {} block is nested inside kotlin { }
Source set androidUnitTest is renamed to androidHostTest in the common module
The org.jetbrains.kotlin.android plugin is removed from the app module
SKIE plugin compatibility with AGP 9 is handled
SQLDelight plugin compatibility with AGP 9 is maintained
AGP version in gradle/libs.versions.toml is updated to 9.0.0 or higher
Gradle wrapper in gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties is updated to 9.1.0 or higher
No removed gradle properties are present in gradle.properties (android.enableLegacyVariantApi, android.r8.integratedResourceShrinking, android.enableNewResourceShrinker.preciseShrinking)
The migration does not break the existing dependency structure between modules
